summary: The CI logs show execution of multiple pre-commit hooks (changelog validation, lazy logging checks, bandit, TypeScript checks, etc.) with no visible error messages or failure indicators in the provided context.
root_cause: The context does not contain explicit error messages, test failures, or output indicating why the job failed. All visible pre-commit hook executions complete with timing information, and logs end with post-job cleanup.

evidence.reason: Last substantive log entry shows a git diff command, followed immediately by post-job cleanup with no error output visible
Final hook completion shows normal timing output with no error indicator
Only warning shown is about Node.js 20 deprecation, not a failure reason

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
